customManagers.description: Docker image tags inside Ansible docker-compose Jinja templates (containers/ is generated, so the source of truth is the .j2)

packageRules.description: Watchtower owns mutable :latest tags — Renovate manages only version-pinned images, so leave latest alone

Bundle minor + patch image bumps into a single weekly PR to cut noise; majors stay separate so they get a deliberate look. Auto-merge once CI (prek + image-smoke) is green and the release has soaked 7 days (mirrors watchtower's COOLDOWN_DELAY — filters fresh upstream breakage); the host health gate is the post-merge safety net.

LinuxServer.io images tag as <upstream-version>-lsNN (e.g. 4.0.17.2952-ls312); the default docker versioning can't order those, so compare them with loose versioning. If a real bump is ever misclassified, refine this to a regex versioning.
